## Completed

- Additional external theorem variants reproduced: 2 (plus Chaitin structure)
- Headline `EXACT`/`EQUIVALENT` formalization coverage: 7 of 44 survey results
  (BY-007, BY-012, BY-013, BY-014, BY-015, BY-016, BY-027); BY-020, BY-021, and
  BY-033 are `RELATED` only (not headline); Gödel II is a `RELATED` companion
  on BY-013 (not double-counted)
- New Lean proofs / bridges: utility Arrow representation; `Verification.rice`;
  robot switching; `Verification.AgentBehavior` consumer of `rice` (CT-4);
  `Learning.no_free_lunch` (BY-021) and `Learning.no_free_lunch_supervised`
  (BY-020) Wolpert finite NFL cores (`NEW_PROOF`); BY-020 strengthened to the
  homogeneous-loss **full-distribution** form (`lossConfig_sum_learner_indep`,
  `ots_error_distribution_learner_indep`, `HomogeneousLoss`); BY-021 strengthened
  to the deterministic **adaptive** no-revisit form (`no_free_lunch_adaptive`,
  `AdaptiveRule`, `observed`), still `RELATED` (stochastic algorithms / learners
  and non-uniform priors remain out of scope)
- Adjacent Lean developments reproduced: 1 vNM expected-utility development
- Reviewed AI-system bridge theorems: 2 fully reviewed rows (BY-012 AgentBehavior;
  BY-033 robot RELATED + scoped interpretation)
- Landscape ledger: `landscape.yaml` for non–Table-1 formalizations (attribution,

- v0.1 publication approved through `e9fdfc0`

- Public metadata and security reporting configured
- Stable root-import API contract compiled for all documented entry points
- Registry schema v3 classifies each Lean declaration independently and records

- Current validation is separated from the immutable v0.1 evidence audit
- Status tables and registry declaration checks are generated from source data
- Registry validation enforces unique records, SPDX licenses, URL syntax, and
  explicit reproduction evidence
- Every Lean module is now either root-import reachable or listed in the single
  CI build-target manifest; the Robot non-vacuity example is explicitly built
- Strict-trust source validation rejects `sorryAx`, `native_decide`, and

- Same-repository formalizations use revision-relative `IN_TREE` provenance,
